name: DKM Knowledge Hub - Capture MVP
purpose: Capture a Telegram/Knowledge Scout learning, structure it with Claude Haiku, store it in Supabase, and notify Telegram topic 2.
connections_summary: Normalize Capture Input -> Structure Learning - Claude Haiku
Structure Learning - Claude Haiku -> Parse & Validate JSON
Learning valide ? true -> Prepare Supabase Insert Payload
Learning valide ? false -> Notify Telegram - validation issue
Prepare Supabase Insert Payload -> Insert Postgres - Knowledge Hub
Insert Postgres - Knowledge Hub -> Notify Telegram - structured
n8n_credentials_required_by_name: Postgres - Knowledge Hub - Supabase OptiAI OS

secrets.notes: No API keys, tokens, DB passwords, service role keys, or credential secret values are stored here.

known_followups: Add a cleaner webhook response/error pattern.
Decide and apply RLS policy strategy for learning_hub.learnings.
Consider switching supabase-mcp-2 to read-only after write tasks.
